name: Clara
brand_statement: A hand-knotted macramé wearable that transforms ancient fiber art into a sculptural heirloom, where organic wood and cotton converge in quiet mastery.
target_audience: Discerning collectors and design connoisseurs who seek wearable art with soul, provenance, and architectural presence.
price_positioning: £1,200–£1,600 — justifies the 12-hour artisan process, rare integration of wood and knotwork, and exclusivity of handmade luxury.
key_message: Wearable sculpture. Time-bound craft. Once-owned, forever-kept.
